current_item: G-6 Maintainer Runbook and Recovery Validation

dynamic_state_rules.main_sha: derive from current origin/main or GitHub repository state; never hard-code as permanent truth
dynamic_state_rules.open_product_prs: derive from current GitHub pull-request state; never hard-code transient PR numbers as permanent truth
dynamic_state_rules.production_state: read the latest dated production verification report and compare its expected/deployed commits before diagnosing production

recovery_sequence: confirm repository identity and default branch
fetch current remote state and record origin/main SHA
inspect open PRs and branch state
read AGENTS and deployment policy plus Cloudflare project policy
read roadmap current checkpoint and execution order
read active phase specification and task-specific contracts
derive canonical counts from the three canonical JSON arrays
read latest production verification report before production diagnosis
run recovery validator and relevant project validation commands
resume the first incomplete roadmap item
repair stale checkpoint in the next appropriate reviewed PR
